report_name: Smart Buildings, Dumb Security: Claroty Warns New Standard Exposes BMS to Remote Attack

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: Attackers can compromise internet-exposed Building Management System (BMS) gateways that use the insecure CEA-852 standard, as the protocol lacks authentication, allowing for remote exploitation and potential remote code execution via malformed packets.

attack_patterns.name: Manipulation of Control
attack_patterns.description: Attackers can intercept, modify, or inject malicious LonTalk packets over an IP network to manipulate physical process controls, such as turning off lights or changing HVAC setpoints, due to the lack of encryption and authentication in the CEA-852 standard.

vulnerabilities.name: CEA-852 Standard Insecure Design
vulnerabilities.description: The CEA-852 standard for tunneling legacy LonTalk protocol packets over IP networks lacks fundamental security controls like authentication and encryption. This design flaw allows any remote attacker who can reach an exposed gateway to send valid commands, manipulate traffic, or potentially achieve remote code execution.

identities.name: EnOcean
identities.description: A vendor mentioned as part of the Building Management System ecosystem affected by the insecure CEA-852 standard.

identities.name: Loytec
identities.description: A vendor mentioned as part of the Building Management System ecosystem affected by the insecure CEA-852 standard.

infrastructure.name: Internet-Exposed BMS Gateway
infrastructure.description: A Building Management System (BMS) gateway implementing the insecure CEA-852 standard and exposed to the internet. It acts as a bridge for attackers to send malicious LonTalk commands to control building systems like HVAC and lighting.

indicators.name: Insecure LonTalk/IP (CEA-852) Protocol Traffic
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Insecure LonTalk/IP (CEA-852) Protocol Traffic
id: 2b1a9c8d-4e5f-4a3b-8c7d-6e5f4a3b2c1d
status: experimental
description: Detects network traffic on UDP ports 1628 or 1629, which are the default ports for the insecure LonTalk/IP (CEA-852) protocol. Traffic from the internet on these ports indicates an exposed Building Management System (BMS) gateway.
references:
  - https://www.industrialcyber.co/management-strategy/claroty-says-cea-852-adoption-accelerates-risk-as-building-systems-become-exposed-to-critical-infrastructure-threats/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-11
tags:
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.initial_access
level: high
logsource:
  category: firewall
detection:
  selection:
    protocol: udp
    destination.port:
      - 1628
      - 1629
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects network traffic on UDP ports 1628 or 1629, which are the default ports for the insecure LonTalk/IP (CEA-852) protocol. Internet-sourced traffic on these ports is a critical indicator of an exposed and vulnerable Building Management System.

indicators.name: Anomalous IT to BMS Network Communication
indicators.pattern:
title: Anomalous IT to BMS Network Communication
id: f9e8d7c6-b5a4-4987-6543-210987fedcba
status: experimental
description: Detects network traffic originating from the corporate IT network destined for the Building Management System (BMS) network. Such traffic may indicate a misconfiguration or an attacker pivoting from IT to OT systems.
references:
  - https://www.industrialcyber.co/management-strategy/claroty-says-cea-852-adoption-accelerates-risk-as-building-systems-become-exposed-to-critical-infrastructure-threats/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-11
tags:
  - attack.t1190
level: medium
logsource:
  category: firewall
detection:
  selection:
    source.ip|cidr:
      - 10.0.0.0/8 # Placeholder for corporate IT subnets
      - 172.16.0.0/12 # Placeholder for corporate IT subnets
      - 192.168.0.0/16 # Placeholder for corporate IT subnets
    destination.ip|cidr:
      - 100.64.0.0/10 # Placeholder for BMS/OT subnets
  filter_known_mgmt:
    source.ip:
      - 192.168.1.100 # Placeholder for authorized management server
  condition: selection and not filter_known_mgmt
indicators.description: Detects un-firewalled communication between the corporate IT network and the dedicated BMS network, which indicates a high-risk configuration that could be exploited for lateral movement.

relationships.source_name: Anomalous IT to BMS Network Communication
